---
title: "Technical"
format: html
---

::: top-banner
:::

::: text-center
*Monday, June 9, 2026*
:::

::: text-center
*1:30 pm*
:::

::: text-center
*Facilitator: Isaac Brito-Morales*
:::

This working group brings together modelers, taxonomic experts, and participants contributing to the technical dimensions of the workshop.

## Participants

| Name | Role | Institution |
|------|------|-------------|
| Isaac Brito-Morales | Facilitator | MCSS |
| Cesar Penaherrera | Participant | MigraMar |
| Mario Pardo | Participant | CICESE |
| Ariadna Juarez | Participant | CICESE |
| Shaleyla Kelez | Participant | EcOceánica |
| Boris DeWitt | Participant | CEAZA; IRD France |
| Yulia Egorova | Participant | University of Miami |
| Ilena Zanella | Participant | Misión Tiburón |
| Luis Vedinana | Participant | Universidad Austral de Chile |
| Frank Garita | Participant | Panacetacea |
| Gabriel Vianna | Participant | Charles Darwin Foundation |
| Lee Hannah | Participant | MCSS |

## Focus areas

- Species distribution models
- Climate scenarios and SSPs
- Climate vulnerability assessment
- Data inputs and information gaps
- Model interpretation and improvement
- Spatial resolution and regional ocean model applications
